hotel_name: Khách sạn Sunlight Hạ Long (Sunlight Hotel Ha Long)

reviews.title: The hotel has no available rooms but did not inform on the app.
reviews.text: I booked from the beginning of the month, but close to the day, the hotel only informed me that they are renovating after Covid-19, so there are no rooms available. If that's the case, then don't have it listed on the app. Or if you forgot, you should have informed me early so I could book somewhere else. This has messed up my schedule as well as my family's.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Check-in is at 1 PM but I was only allowed to check in at 2 PM, check-out is at 12 PM but I was asked to check out at 11 AM and they knocked on the door at 11:15 AM. I booked this hotel for various reasons but was told there were no rooms available and transferred to another place, there was no parking, and the wifi was extremely weak.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location and clean room. Quick check in for my solo traveller

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Phòng chưa tốt với giá, thái độ nhân viên quá tệ.
Room not good for the price, staff attitude is too bad.

reviews.title: I was surprised because the door was locked after 12 o'clock.
reviews.text: There are often no staff at the front, and communication in English is not possible. The entrance door was locked after 12 o'clock, so I couldn't get in. Fortunately, I was able to call and they opened the door for me, but I do not want to use it again next time.

reviews.positives: Sự hỗ trợ nhiệt tình của bạn Thành là điều ấn tượng nhất mà mình có được ở đây
reviews.negatives: Trên ứng dụng booking thì có bãi đỗ xe miễn phí và không cần đặt trước nhưng thực tế đoàn nhà mình đi xe 45 chỗ đến và khách sạn không có chỗ đỗ xe, phải tự đi tìm chỗ đỗ xe rất vất vả

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: No parking available. No swimming pool. Convenient for shopping.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Nhân viên lễ tân thái độ không tốt

reviews.title: You get what you pay for
reviews.text:
No one speaks any English at all and noooooo credit cards accepted. 
Must pay cash

reviews.title: Nếu đi 1 mình, không cần view đẹp thì nên chọn. Giá cũng bình dân
reviews.positives: Địa điểm tốt, cạnh nhiều chỗ chơi, cạnh chợ hải sản, huyên náo về đêm....
reviews.negatives:
Đặt chỗ qua app, thì lại không được xác nhận được thông tin.
Đến nơi nhận phòng, việc không có tên trong danh sách làm mình có trải nghiệm khá không hài lòng từ đầu.
Lên tới phòng thì điều hòa yếu, tivi hỏng điều khiển...

reviews.title: Unprofessional
reviews.text: Upon arrival for check-in, they reported that there were no available rooms despite the guest having booked and confirmed through Agoda!

reviews.title: Continuous power outage
reviews.text: I went to the reception to report the power outage, but they kept lying that it hadn't been reported, so they won't fix it :(((

reviews.title: khá ổn
reviews.positives: phòng sạch sẽ, gần khu chợ và ăn uống
reviews.negatives: Hơi xa biển. Không có dọn phòng vào buổi sáng hôm sau (nhưng vì phòng rẻ nên ok)

reviews.title: Good place big room
reviews.text: In the center of town it’s s little bit of a walk to the beach and not close to the marina. Room was very big and clean. Front desk was in and out when checking in and out had to wait a bit.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the staff is friendly and enthusiastic! The only inconvenience is the motorcycle parking area!

reviews.title: Thoughts
reviews.text: The hotel near Cái Dăm market is convenient, but those who plan to go out in Ha Long at night should reconsider when booking because the hotel closes very early. If you return from going out at 10:30 PM, the hotel will be closed, and it takes a long time to call the reception for someone to open the door.

reviews.title: It's good for the price.
reviews.text: It's an old hotel, but it's not bad for a man staying alone considering the price.

reviews.title: Well-located hotel
reviews.text: It's a place with a good location, but since it's old, it seems to need some remodeling.

reviews.title: Leisure trip
reviews.text: Nice easy stay

reviews.title: Quite good
reviews.positives: Phòng ốc rộng rãi thoải mái, thiết kế nhẹ nhàng trang nhã, giương nệm êm ái, chỗ nghỉ thuận tiện
reviews.negatives: Hơi tối và nhân viên ko chuyên nghiệp

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 703 bathroom drain blockage, 701 toilet blockage

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The fresh market at downstairs and night market is near by.washing machine at rooftop.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Everything is fine, just that there is no garage.

reviews.title: Lovely staff and big, beautiful room!
reviews.text: We loved everything about Sunlight Hotel. The location was excellent, though a bit of a hike to the beach. Lots of great restaurants and cafes nearby. The room itself was large, well-lit, and beautiful.

reviews.title: Kỳ nghỉ thật tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Khách sạn ngay chợ,rất tuyệt vời

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
The place is in the middle of the city next to a big local market, the rooms are clean and large.
Definitely recommended.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hotel was good

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: We are more than 11 people and need to rent 5 rooms. The rooms are spacious, clean, and impeccable, everyone praised them. Right below, there is a seafood market with affordable prices.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Külmkapp haises ja müra oli kõva

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Gd

reviews.title: Okay...
reviews.negatives: Although the air conditioning was present as mentioned when booking, it did not work, and it was very hot. It was almost impossible to sleep in the room because it was so hot.

reviews.title: Beautiful and reasonably priced.
reviews.text: Beautiful at a reasonable price.

reviews.title: very good value for money
reviews.text:
The hotel is conveniently located near the beach, buses, the market, and typical Vietnamese restaurants.
The view from the room (we were on the 8th floor) is very nice. The hotel is quiet and has everything you need. I would be happy to come back anytime.

reviews.title: 直ぐ下に市場があり買物にべんり
reviews.text: 朝から活気のある声がします。海産物、果物売っています。Vietnamの考え方がわかるホテルでした。

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: 위치는 좋아요. 가격대비 좋아요.

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text:
We paid for second bed - got a broken bed with thin matress
The hotel was closed although they said 24 hours check in
Didnt enjoy it

reviews.text: Hợp với giá tiền. Đồ dùng hỏng nhiều

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách sạn vị trí tt, thuận tiện đi lại, xứng đáng với tầm giá tiền. Nếu KH ăn uống hải sản thì khuyên chân thành vào những nhà hàng như Làng Chài, Hồng Hạnh, Thu Duyên,... đừng ăn những quán gần ks vd như Thu Nam chẳng hạn, giá cả tính vớ vẩn, gặp khách kb là chặt chém và khách gọi đồ toàn kiểu ép khách gọi sl nhiều,....
